scores.notes: Agent uses legacy install+config-changed pattern with direct self.unit.status= rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent pattern. The description does not mention containers/resources sections in charmcraft.yaml, which are required for a valid K8s charm — likely incomplete. The described APIs (WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus, install/config-changed events) are all real. Scored down on idiomatic for legacy pattern and complete for likely missing containers/resources.
